hero.badge: ✨ Your First Session Is Completely Free
hero.headline_main: Learn or Teach Your Children the Quran with Mastery
hero.headline_sub: With Ayat Muhkamat Quran Learning Academy Under the supervision of Sheikh Islam Sobhi Al-Eisawi
hero.cta_secondary: Learn about our teaching method first ↓

problem.intro: Many people want to learn the Quran but face real obstacles that hold them back.
problem.card1_title: Can't find a qualified local sheikh
problem.card1_body: No qualified teacher available nearby or in their country.
problem.card2_title: Hard to correct recitation without an expert
problem.card2_body: Without a specialist it is difficult to identify and fix errors.
problem.card3_body: Memorization without review is quickly forgotten.
problem.card4_title: Limited time due to work or study
problem.card4_body: Fixed schedules do not fit every person's circumstances.
problem.bridge: That's exactly why we built Ayat Muhkamat Academy — to be your easiest path to learning the Quran from anywhere in the world.

solution.headline: The Solution with Ayat Muhkamat Academy
solution.subtitle: A complete Quran learning program — structured, easy, and accessible through:
solution.item1: One-on-one live sessions with the teacher
solution.item2: A memorization plan tailored to your exact level
solution.item4: Precise recitation correction and Tajweed rules
solution.closing: All of this from the comfort of your home — no travel, no wasted time.

services.headline: What Do We Offer?
services.card1_body: A structured program for memorizing the Quran with continuous tracking and precise revision tailored to each student's level.
services.card2_body: Learn correct Quranic recitation and fix pronunciation errors, articulation points, and sound quality under direct supervision.
services.card3_body: Clear, practical explanation of all Tajweed rules with direct application during recitation to reinforce learning.
services.card4_body: Opportunity to receive a formal Ijazah in the Quran after mastering recitation and completing a full khatm with the sheikh — with a chain connected to the Prophet ﷺ.

why_us.headline: Why Choose Ayat Muhkamat Academy?
why_us.item1: One-on-one sessions for full student focus
why_us.item2: Teaching suitable for all ages without exception
why_us.item3: Teachers specialized in Quran and its sciences
why_us.item4: Continuous weekly follow-up on memorization and recitation
why_us.item5: Clear, organized curriculum that grows with the student
why_us.item6: Opportunity to obtain Ijazah with connected chain

age_groups.headline: The Academy Welcomes All Ages
age_groups.subtitle: Every student receives an individual learning plan tailored to their level and pace.
age_groups.card1_body: We start children from scratch in a fun, age-appropriate way that builds a genuine love for the Quran.
age_groups.card2_body: A flexible program suited for those busy with school or work, with an intensive memorization plan.
age_groups.card3_body: With patience and care, we help you complete what you started and finish the Book of Allah at any stage of life.

how_it_works.headline: Start Your Quran Journey in Just 3 Steps
how_it_works.step1_body: Send us a WhatsApp message and pick a time that works for you from available slots.
how_it_works.step2_title: We Assess Your Recitation or Memorization Level
how_it_works.step2_body: In the first session, the sheikh listens to you and determines the right starting point for your journey.
how_it_works.step3_body: Your regular sessions begin with a clear plan and continuous follow-up until you reach your goal.

free_session.headline: Try Before You Commit — First Session Is Completely Free
free_session.body: We offer you a fully free trial session to discover our teaching method and assess your level — with no commitment or conditions.

testimonials.headline: What Our Students Say
testimonials.t1_quote: My son started from scratch and memorized the entire Juz Amma in 6 months. The follow-up with the sheikh is outstanding.
testimonials.t2_quote: I used to be embarrassed to read in front of anyone. Now I read confidently and know the Tajweed rules.
testimonials.t3_quote: I received my Ijazah with a connected chain after a year and a half. A lifelong dream fulfilled.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, all sessions are one-on-one to ensure maximum focus and the best possible follow-up for every student.
faq.a2: Yes, we welcome students from age 5 and up, with a curriculum specifically designed for each age group.
faq.a3: Yes, all sessions are conducted online, allowing you to learn from anywhere in the world.
faq.a4: Yes, every student's level is assessed during the first free session before the program begins.
faq.q5: Is it possible to obtain an Ijazah?
faq.a5: Yes, after mastering recitation and completing a full khatm with the sheikh, you can receive an Ijazah with a connected chain.
faq.a6: The sheikh determines the appropriate number of sessions based on each student's program, level, and goal.

cta.headline: Don't Delay Learning the Quran
cta.sub: Start today your journey with the Book of Allah and book your free session now.
cta.badge: ✨ First Session Free — No Commitment Required
